title: quercus devia
intro: Quercus devia, also known as the Chinese or Korean oak, is a species of deciduous tree native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Quercus devia include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Quercus devia can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
